title: Unidentified clone commando sniper
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image=[[File:WhiteSquadSniper.jpg]] |name=Unidentified commando sniper |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth= |death=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]{{CWACite|3|The Package (comic story)}} |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] *[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] **[[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]]''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' ***[[Sarge's clone commando squad (Ord Mantell)|Sarge's clone commando squad]]{{TCW|Orders (episode)}} |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I see the package. Second speeder.''"
"''Good. Now we thin the ranks.|The commando sniper and Sarge, during the mission to Ord Mantell|}} This '''clone commando sniper''' was a member of a [[Sarge's clone commando squad (Ord Mantell)|squad]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic's]] [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] who carried out [[Special forces/Legends|special forces]] missions for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. A [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], this [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] was born on the [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]], and acted as his [[Squad/Legends|squad's]] [[Clone sharpshooter/Legends|sniper]] during a [[Mission to Ord Mantell (Clone Wars)|mission]] to the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] planet, [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. There, he and his [[Commando/Legends|commando]] brothers engaged a group of [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] bounty hunters responsible for stealing a [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomatic]] [[The Package|package]] bound for [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. He was responsible for the [[Death/Legends|death]] of a number of the Trandoshan [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]], but perished when the [[Bomb/Legends|ordnance]] module on his [[Backpack/Legends|backpack]] was struck by enemy [[Blaster/Legends|blasterfire]], detonating it and killing the commando. The [[Sniper/Legends|sniper's]] squad leader, [[Sarge (clone commando)|Sarge]], mourned the loss of his comrade before taking the life of his squadmate's killer and recovering the parcel they had been sent to retrieve. ==Biography== {{Quote|Last night, Trandoshan bounty hunters intercepted a package of ''extreme diplomatic'' importance, intended for ''Supreme Chancellor Palpatine''. They intend to sell it to the Separatists. You are going to make sure that situation does not occur.|[[Unidentified Advanced Recon Commando (intelligence officer)|ARC trooper officer]]|}} [[File:Sarge_briefing.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The commando sniper and his squad are briefed by an ARC trooper officer]] A [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], this [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] was born on the [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]], located in the remote [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' Over the following [[Standard year/Legends|years]], he was trained as a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] to serve in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. Following the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]] that triggered the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], the clone [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] was deployed with the rest of the Grand [[Army/Legends|Army]] and like all of his [[Commando/Legends|commando]] comrades, joined the ranks of [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]], a [[Special forces/Legends|special forces]] unit within the Grand Army made up of clone commandos and [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commandos]]. Six [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the events of [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], the commando was serving as a member of a [[Sarge's clone commando squad (Ord Mantell)|squad]] led by clone commando [[Sarge (clone commando)|Sarge]]. He and his [[Squad/Legends|squad]], in addition to the members of [[Unidentified clone commando squad (Ord Mantell)|another]], were summoned to the headquarters of [[Republic Intelligence/Legends|Republic Intelligence]], where they were met by an ARC [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] [[Unidentified Advanced Recon Commando (intelligence officer)|intelligence officer]] in [[Color/Legends|yellow]]-marked [[Phase I clone trooper armor/Legends|armor]]. The ARC trooper informed the assembled commandos that a [[The Package|package]] sent by [[Malastare/Legends|Malastarian]] [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomats]] and intended for [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] had been intercepted while en route and stolen by a gang of [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] bounty hunters. The eight commandos were then tasked with retrieving the stolen package from the Trandoshans, a [[Mission to Ord Mantell (Clone Wars)|mission]] that was to take place on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. [[File:White_Squad.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The commando and his squad rush to pursue the bounty hunters]] At midday on Ord Mantell, the commandos put their ambush into action, with the members of the sniper's squad taking position on a rooftop while the other squad blocked the street the Trandoshans were traveling by [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeders]] not far away. This commando provided surveillance for the squad using his [[Sniper rifle/Legends|sniper rifle]], identifying the package they had been sent after aboard the second in a convoy of three [[Speeder/Legends|speeders]] the bounty hunters were [[Pilot/Legends|piloting]]. His [[Unidentified White Squad ordnance specialist commando|squadmate]] opened fire with a [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launcher]], destroying the lead speeder and [[Death/Legends|killing]] the Trandoshans within; the [[Missile/Legends|missile]] strike also signaled the squad on the street to engage the enemy, rushing the target speeder. The Trandoshans fled, throwing a number of [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]] from their vehicle that exploded in the wake of their escape, killing the attacking squad. However, the commando [[Clone sharpshooter/Legends|sniper]] was able to [[Blaster/Legends|shoot]] the pilot of the second fleeing speeder in the head, killing him instantly and sending the vehicle out of control before crashing in a burst of flame. The final speeder, the one carrying the package the commandos had been tasked with recovering, sped away in the direction of the industrial yards, with the [[Sniper/Legends|sniper]] and his squad following in a speeder of their own, piloted by the squad's fourth member. [[File:Blue_Weapon_Commando.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The squad's sniper lies dead after being ambushed by the bounty hunters' leader]] Tracking the Trandoshan bounty hunters to a courtyard in the industrial yards, the squad split up to search for [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]]. The pilot located the Trandoshans first, falling quickly to fire from the group of Confederacy [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] that had been sent to make the buy for the package. The squad's leader tossed an [[Electromagnetic pulse grenade/Legends|EMP grenade]] through the door, shorting out the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] before he and the other members of his squad burst in, destroying the droids with their [[DC-17m Interchangeable Weapon System/Legends|DC-17m]] [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifles]]. The Trandoshans had run behind a secondary [[Blast door/Legends|blast door]] however, which the clone sniper and his team were forced to blow their way through before [[Lightfight|engaging]] the bounty hunters. The squad's ordnance specialist died from a hail of Trandoshan fire, but a [[Grenade/Legends|grenade]] from the squad leader killed all but one of the remaining bounty hunters. The Trandoshan leader emerged from his hidden cover and [[Wrist blaster/Legends|fired]] on the sniper, his shot striking the ordnance module on the commando's [[Backpack/Legends|backpack]], killing him in the resultant explosion. The squad leader futilely reached out to his dead brother, but accepting that there was nothing he could do for him, the clone commando attacked the final bounty hunter, pinning him to the ground before ending his life with the [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]] housed in his [[Gauntlet/Legends|gauntlet's]] [[Gauntlet vibroblade/Legends|knuckle plate]]. The clone recovered the package, and saw its safe return to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and into the hands of Chancellor Palpatine. ==Equipment== This commando served as his squad's sniper during the mission to Ord Mantell, and in addition to the DC-17m blaster [[Rifle/Legends|rifle]] standard to all clone commandos, he wielded an additional [[Sniper rifle/Legends|sniper rifle]] with a significantly longer barrel and stock, one which he used with lethal accuracy. The commando also wore [[Katarn-class commando armor/Legends|''Katarn''-class commando armor]], and decorated the [[Armor/Legends|armor]] with patched of the [[Color/Legends|color]] [[blue]]. His helmet was adorned with [[Macrobinoculars/Legends|macrobinoculars]], enhancing the advanced [[Heads-up display/Legends|HUD]] system built into the helmet. ==Behind the scenes== In [[2005]], the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 3|third volume]] of the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Clone Wars Adventures'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comics]] introduced two squads of Republic commandos with the story "[[The Package (comic story)|The Package]]," the clone commander sniper among them. ==Appearances== *{{CWACite|3|The Package (comic story)}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Clone commandos]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Special Operations Brigade personnel]]
